blocker: Live budgeted frontier sweep (real LLM under each preset) needs API access; scoped out as documented follow-up, not faked. Harness + offline demo complete.
one_line: Added time/step budget-limited episode variants as a wrapper over the unchanged refine_loop (BudgetConfig + PRESETS unbounded/relaxed/tight/pager-storm); 7/7 offline tests pass and a demo shows a slow 2-try model win under loose budgets but escalate under pager-storm — no core files edited.
